_publications._publicationTitle: Human cutaneous neurofibroma matrisome revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing.

_contextSnippet: Initially, we optimized a protocol that allows cell extraction with high yield and viability coupled to the 10XGenomics technology for scRNA-Seq.
resourceName: whole skin dissociation kit (Miltenyi Biotec, Cat. No. 130-101-540)
details: Successfully used for cell extraction with high yield and viability from fresh human cutaneous neurofibromas
